mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, total_amount, address_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{value} ORDER BY order_id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT o.order_id, o.user_id, o.total_amount, o.address_id, o.status, o.created_at, o.updated_at FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{user_id} AND oi.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
SELECT order_id, user_id, total_amount, address_id, status, created_at, updated_at, cancel_reason, cancelled_at FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( user_id, total_amount, address_id, status ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{total_amount}, #{address_id}, #{status} )
INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, product_id, price, quantity, status ) VALUES ( #{order_id}, #{product_id}, #{price}, #{quantity}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.status, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at, p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL, (oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{value} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, cancel_reason = #{cancel_reason}, cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
mapper.select: SELECT product_id FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{value} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status != 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) AS pendingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS paidCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'PREPARING' THEN 1 END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN 1 END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 END) AS confirmedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS cancelCount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{value}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.status, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at, p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL, oi.quantity, oi.price, (oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{order_id} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_items SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}

UPDATE order_items SET status = 'CONFIRMED', confirmed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_item_id = #{order_item_id} AND status = 'DELIVERED' AND order_id IN ( SELECT order_id FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{user_id} )
